aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Max Air HVAC due to their strong local presence and reviews, but improvements in structured data and conversational content are needed to enhance visibility.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema with detailed service information.
Create an FAQ section with questions AI models prioritize for HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve local search presence.
Q&A section is not actively managed, missing opportunities for customer interaction.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected, ensuring reliable local search performance.

schema_gaps: Incomplete HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
Service area details could be enriched in LocalBusiness schema

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of detailed structured data limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair near me' and 'energy-efficient HVAC solutions'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ schema with questions AI models prioritize for HVAC topics.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts through detailed service explanations and customer-centric content.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing your digital presence for voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI models lack detailed structured data to cite their services effectively.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement comprehensive schema markup, enrich conversational content, and actively manage GBP to align with AI search trends.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are capturing market share—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: Unleash the Power of AEO for HVAC Leads
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search presence.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital strategy for AI-driven growth.
